dict.string: Camera access is needed to capture photos and videos for device monitoring and security features.
Microphone access is needed for audio recording and two-way communication features.
Your precise location is needed for location-based device automation and control.
Background location access is needed for location-based automation and geofencing.
Background location access enables location-based device automation.
Bluetooth access is needed to connect to and control your smart devices.
Continuous Bluetooth access is needed to discover and connect to nearby devices.
Motion data access is needed for device activity tracking features.
Health data access integrates with fitness and biometric devices.
Health data access integrates with fitness and biometric devices.
Contact access is needed for device sharing and multi-user functionality.
Photo library access is needed for camera device playback and management.
Permission to save photos and videos captured by your device cameras.
Calendar access is needed for scheduling device automation and events.
Reminders access is needed to create device-related notifications and alerts.
HomeKit access is needed for smart home device integration and control.
Notification permission is needed to send alerts about device status and events.
Face ID authentication securely authenticates and controls your smart devices.
Local network access is needed to discover and control devices on your network.
